data.title: REX-Osprey SOL ETF Sees Significant Inflows
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported that the REX-Osprey SOL spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $1.4 million yesterday. Since its launch, the ETF has accumulated a total net inflow of $120.2 million.

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC USD) Price To See More Overbought RSI Conditions: PlanB
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC USD) RSI had reached 75 earlier this week, with PlanB suggesting that this could lead to more months of overbought levels. The analyst based his view on similar market setups in earlier bull runs. Notably, this had occurred as Bitcoin traded near $118,700, with increased trading activity
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/25/bitcoin-btc-usd-price-to-see-more-overbought-rsi-conditions-planb/

data.title: $10,000 To Be Handed To US Bank’s Customers After ‘Extraordinary Losses’ Allegedly Triggered by Data Breach
data.description:
A US bank has agreed to pay up to $10,000 to customers affected by an alleged data breach that exposed personally identifying information. According to a settlement administrator’s portal, The Bank of Canton will pay $300,000 to settle a lawsuit accusing the Canton, Massachusetts-based lender of negligent data security practices.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/10000-to-be-handed-to-us-banks-customers-after-extraordinary-losses-allegedly-triggered-by-data-breach/

data.title: Polymarket $10k bet on NASCAR race turns to $60k dispute following Zelensky controversy
data.description:
A routine $10,000 prediction market on Polymarket covering Sunday’s NASCAR Cup Series race erupted into a dispute in UMA’s history after the oracle rejected an early settlement proposal, despite it being accurate.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/polymarket-10k-bet-on-nascar-race-turns-to-60k-dispute-following-zelensky-controversy/

data.title: Under-the-Radar DeFi Lending Altcoin Defies Crypto Market Downtick Amid New Proposal To Increase Staking Rewards
data.description:
A decentralized finance (DeFi) altcoin that received trading support from the crypto exchange Binance in May is seeing gains despite the dip in the digital assets market. The token of Maple Finance (SYRUP) is currently changing hands for $0. 475, up by 7. 95% over the past 24 hours
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/under-the-radar-defi-lending-altcoin-defies-crypto-market-downtick-amid-new-proposal-to-increase-staking-rewards/

data.description:

S. finalizing a trade pact with […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-says-trade-deal-with-eu-has-only-a-50-50-chance/

data.title: Corporate whales: public firms holding at least 1,000 BTC grow 50% in 2025 – Fidelity
data.description:
The cohort of publicly traded companies with holdings of at least 1,000 Bitcoin (BTC) has surged from 24 at the end of the first quarter to 35 as of July 25, representing a nearly 50% increase.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/corporate-whales-public-firms-holding-at-least-1000-btc-grow-50-in-2025-fidelity/

data.title: DOJ weighs Dragonfly’s role in Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm trial
data.description:
The U. S. Department of Justice is weighing potential charges against Dragonfly Capital leaders following the current legal actions against Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm. According to journalist Eleanor Terrett in a post on X, Storm’s defense had requested General Partner Tom Schmidt to testify on communications touching on Tornado Cash Know Your Customer (KYC) considerations. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/doj-weighs-dragonflys-role-in-tornado-cash-co-founder-roman-storm-trial/

data.title: ETH to Lead BTC Over Next 6 Months, Says Galaxy CEO
data.description:
Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz says Ethereum may outpace Bitcoin in the next 3–6 months amid rising ETF inflows and strong corporate adoption.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/eth-to-lead-btc-over-next-6-months-says-galaxy-ceo/

data.title: Tea App That Claimed to Protect Women Exposes 72,000 IDs in Epic Security Fail
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/331961/tea-app-claimed-protect-women-exposes-72000-ids-epic-security-fail

data.title: Warren Buffett Indicator jumps to most expensive stock market valuation in history
data.description:
The US stock market’s current valuation has surpassed even the peaks seen during the Dot-Com Bubble and the 2008 Financial Crisis, according to the so-called “Warren Buffett Indicator. ” The metric compares the total market capitalization of US stocks to the country’s Gross Domestic Product (GDP), which surged to 212%, its highest level in history. JUST […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/buffett-indicator-jumps-to-expensive-stock/
